Comment: PRISM Production Pipeline — nightly 9PM UTC. Sequential ingestion (account concurrency limit=10), dynamic validation paths, SSM hard FAIL gate.

Parameters.Subject: PRISM Ingest Alert -- ServiceNow CMDB failed
Parameters.Message:
PRISM Pipeline -- Ingest Failure Alert
=======================================================
Source  : ServiceNow CMDB
Lambda  : ingest-servicenow-cmdb

What Happened
---------------------------------------------
  The ServiceNow CMDB Lambda failed during the nightly run.
  The pipeline will continue with remaining sources.
  Bronze data for ServiceNow CMDB was NOT updated tonight.

Impact
---------------------------------------------
  Silver and Gold tables that depend on ServiceNow CMDB
  will reflect the last successful ingest instead.

Next Steps
---------------------------------------------
  1. Check Lambda logs: /aws/lambda/ingest-servicenow-cmdb
  2. Check Step Functions: pipeline-nightly-sfn > latest run
  3. Fix and re-trigger if needed, or wait for nightly retry.

This is an automated alert from the PRISM pipeline.
Do not reply to this message.

ContractValidationMap.Comment: Validate all 7 datasets in parallel against their contracts

Parameters.Subject: PRISM Pipeline Warning -- Contract validation failed for one or more datasets
Parameters.Message:
PRISM -- Contract Validation Warning
=======================================================

One or more Bronze datasets failed schema contract validation.
The pipeline is continuing, but affected datasets have been
quarantined and will NOT flow into Silver.

What This Means
-------------------------------------------------------
  Quarantined files are excluded from today's Silver transform.
  Silver row counts may be lower than expected.
  Gold insights for the affected source will use yesterday's data.

Next Steps
-------------------------------------------------------
  1. Check which datasets were rejected:
     aws s3 ls s3://bronze-quarantine-400528359101/ --recursive

  2. Review the contract validation Lambda logs:
     Log group: /aws/lambda/ingest-contract-validate

  3. Fix the source data or update the contract file in:
     s3://bronze-staged-400528359101/Contracts/

  4. Re-trigger the pipeline or wait for the next nightly run.

Quarantine bucket  : s3://bronze-quarantine-400528359101/
Contract files     : s3://bronze-staged-400528359101/Contracts/
Step Functions     : pipeline-nightly-sfn > latest run

This is an automated alert from the PRISM pipeline.
Do not reply to this message.

QualityGateCheck.Comment: Hard FAIL if Silver quality check does not return PASS

Parameters.Subject: PRISM Pipeline BLOCKED -- Silver quality gate failed, Gold update halted
Parameters.Message:
PRISM -- Silver Quality Gate Blocked
=======================================================

The Silver quality gate has FAILED. The pipeline has halted.
Gold tables are NOT being updated tonight.

What This Means
-------------------------------------------------------
  All Gold Iceberg tables are frozen at yesterday's data.
  QuickSight dashboards will show stale data until resolved.
  The SSM gate flag is currently set to false -- this is
  what is blocking Gold from running.

Next Steps
-------------------------------------------------------
  1. Check which DQ checks failed:
     Log group: /aws/lambda/silver-quality-check

  2. Fix the root cause in Bronze source or Silver transform.

  3. Reset the SSM gate once fixed:
     aws ssm put-parameter \
       --name /pipeline/silver/quality_check_passed \
       --value true --overwrite --region us-east-1

  4. Re-trigger if you cannot wait for the next nightly run:
     aws stepfunctions start-execution \
       --state-machine-arn \
       arn:aws:states:us-east-1:400528359101:stateMachine/pipeline-nightly-sfn

SSM gate  : /pipeline/silver/quality_check_passed
Log group : /aws/lambda/silver-quality-check
Step Fn   : pipeline-nightly-sfn > latest run

This is an automated alert from the PRISM pipeline.
Do not reply to this message.

QualityGateFailState.Cause: Silver quality check did not return PASS — Gold execution blocked

Parameters.Subject: PRISM Pipeline -- Nightly Run Complete
Parameters.Message:
PRISM Pipeline — Nightly Run Complete
=======================================================

The PRISM nightly pipeline completed successfully.
All data has been refreshed with today's latest insights.

Run Summary
-------------------------------------------------------
  All data sources ingested
  Silver quality checks passed
  Gold tables updated
  Bedrock AI summary refreshed
  Dashboard showing today's data

What to Review
-------------------------------------------------------
  Open the PRISM Dashboard to check:
    - FinOps: zombie count and wasted spend
    - Compliance: device compliance posture
    - CTI: any new threat intelligence findings
    - Lifecycle: devices due for refresh

Dashboard : https://d32of2ss6u4eo7.cloudfront.net/index.html
Step Functions : pipeline-nightly-sfn

This is an automated notification from the PRISM pipeline.
Do not reply to this message.

Parameters.Subject: PRISM Pipeline FAILED -- Nightly run stopped at a critical stage
Parameters.Message:
PRISM -- Critical Pipeline Failure
=======================================================

The PRISM nightly pipeline failed at a critical stage and
could not continue. This is NOT an ingest warning -- a core
transform or gate step has failed.

Likely Failure Points
-------------------------------------------------------
  - Silver_transform Glue job crashed (schema drift or OOM)
  - gold-transform Glue job crashed (Iceberg write failure)
  - gold-ai-insights Lambda timed out or Bedrock error
  - SSM quality gate stuck at false from a previous run

Next Steps
-------------------------------------------------------
  1. Find the failed state in Step Functions:
     pipeline-nightly-sfn > latest execution (failed state in red)

  2. Check the relevant log group:
     Glue Silver  : AWS Glue > Jobs > Silver_transform > Logs
     Glue Gold    : AWS Glue > Jobs > gold-transform > Logs
     Bedrock      : /aws/lambda/gold-ai-insights

  3. Check SSM gate is not stuck:
     aws ssm get-parameter \
       --name /pipeline/silver/quality_check_passed \
       --region us-east-1

  4. Reset gate if stuck (after confirming Silver is healthy):
     aws ssm put-parameter \
       --name /pipeline/silver/quality_check_passed \
       --value true --overwrite --region us-east-1

  5. Re-trigger once root cause is fixed:
     aws stepfunctions start-execution \
       --state-machine-arn \
       arn:aws:states:us-east-1:400528359101:stateMachine/pipeline-nightly-sfn

Step Functions : pipeline-nightly-sfn > latest execution
Glue console   : AWS Glue > Jobs
SSM gate       : /pipeline/silver/quality_check_passed

This is an automated alert from the PRISM pipeline.
Do not reply to this message.

PipelineFailState.Cause: Critical pipeline stage failed — check CloudWatch logs

Catch.Comment: Dashboard gen failure is non-blocking — pipeline continues
